data.title: Donner Ultimate Comp Mini Compressor Pedal - Used Excellent
data.description:
The Donner Ultimate Comp is a two-mode analog compressor in a mini housing. It covers the two most common comp applications: optical style for smooth transparent squish, and hard knee for more aggressive peak limiting. True bypass, runs on standard 9V. It does what it says, sounds good, and takes up almost no board space. Pedal only, no power supply.

Brand | Donner
Model | Ultimate Comp
Type | Analog compressor
Modes | 2 (optical, hard knee)
Bypass | True bypass
Power | 9V DC (not included)
Condition | Used, excellent condition
Includes | Pedal only

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Used, excellent condition. Fully functional, no issues. Pedal only, no power supply included.
